# Trip Overview

**Dates:** November 2-15, 2025  
**Duration:** 14 days  
**Group Size:** 16 participants plus coordinators and Heidi Parkes  
**Featured Artist:** Heidi Parkes  

Experience hand quilting and design inspiration in Japan with artist Heidi Parkes. This intimate tour features sewing time, hands-on workshops, arts & culture tours, admission to the Yokohama Quilt Festival, and more.

## What's Included

- 13 nights in 4- and 5-star hotels (breakfast included)
- Guided English-speaking experiences and tours
- Chartered buses and bullet train tickets
- Various meals as specified in itinerary

---

## November 2 - Day 1

**Location:** Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Dinner included

### Activities

- Arrival Day + Welcome Dinner
- Overnight at Hotel East 21

---

## November 3 - Day 2

**Location:** Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Lunch and Dinner included

### Activities

- Group Sewing with Heidi Parkes
- Japan Folk Crafts Museum
- Fabric Shopping
- Overnight at Hotel East 21

---

## November 4 - Day 3

**Location:** Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Dinner included

### Activities

- Tokyo Day Tour with a guide
- (Meiji Jingu Shrine, Tsukiji Outer Market: Lunch on Your Own)
- Kimono & Tea Ceremony Experience, Asakusa
- Overnight at Hotel East 21

---

## November 5 - Day 4

**Location:** Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Lunch & Dinner included

### Activities

- Luggage Transfer to Kyoto
- Group Sewing With Heidi Parkes
- Hikaru Noguchi Workshop
- Digital Art Experience
- Tokyo Skytree
- Overnight at Hotel East 21

---

## November 6 - Day 5

**Location:** Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Dinner included

### Activities

- Tokyo Metropolitan Art Museum
- Lunch on your own
- Sashiko Museum
- Overnight at Hotel Regina Lake Kawaguchi

---

## November 7 - Day 6

**Location:** Mt. Fuji Area

**Meals Included:** Lunch & Dinner included

### Activities

- Kubota Itchiku Museum
- Oahino Hakkai (Eight Ponds of Oshino) near Mt. Fuji
- Bullet Train to Kyoto
- Group Sewing with Heidi Parkes
- Overnight at Princess Kyoto

---

## November 8 - Day 7

**Location:** Kyoto

**Meals Included:** Lunch included

### Activities

- Kyoto Day Tour
- (Kiyomizu Temple, Sanju Sangendo, Fushimi Inari Shrine; optional: Nishiki Market; Nomura Taylor)
- Overnight at Princess Kyoto

---

## November 9 - Day 8

**Location:** Kyoto

**Meals Included:** Lunch included

### Activities

- Himeji Castle
- Free time in Kyoto
- Dinner on your own
- Overnight at Princess Kyoto

---

## November 10 - Day 9

**Location:** Kyoto

**Meals Included:** Lunch & Dinner included

### Activities

- Luggage transfer to Tokyo
- Kyoto Day Tour
- (Kinkakuji, Daitoku-ji, Nijo Castle, Arashiyama)
- Overnight at Princess Kyoto

---

## November 11 - Day 10

**Location:** Niigata

**Meals Included:** Lunch and Dinner included

### Activities

- Domestic air from Osaka to Niigata (included)
- Niigata Ginka
- Tachikawa Weaving Factory
- Northern Culture Museum
- Overnight at Hotel Nikko Niigata

## November 12 - Day 11

**Location:** Niigata

**Meals Included:** Lunch and Dinner included

### Activities

- Akiko Ike Workshop in Echizenhama (Instagram: niigata.ginka.mokukinndo)
- Hoshina Studio
- Bento Box lunch
- Bullet Train from Niigata to Tokyo (Train ticket included)
- Overnight Grand Nikko Odaiba Tokyo

---

## November 13 - Day 12

**Location:** Yokohama/Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Dinner included

### Activities

- Lunch on your own
- Overnight Grand Nikko Odaiba Tokyo

## November 14 - Day 13

**Location:** Tokyo

**Meals Included:** Lunch & Dinner included

### Activities
